description: A designed text card on a light background. A purple serif headline reads 'Leader Schumer Statement On Senate Democrats Securing A Deal To Pay TSA Workers, Fund FEMA, And Defend The Homeland Without ICE Funding'. The italic body text, datelined Washington, D.C., describes a funding agreement for TSA, the Coast Guard, FEMA and CISA, states there is no blank check for ICE and Border Patrol, and closes with remarks praising the Democratic caucus. It ends with '###'.
notable_text: Leader Schumer Statement On Senate Democrats Securing A Deal To Pay TSA Workers, Fund FEMA, And Defend The Homeland Without ICE Funding; Washington, D.C.
